item-ambrosias-thorns.name: Ambrosia's Thorns
item-ambrosias-thorns.description: Thorns that protect Ambrosia's chrysalis. All beautiful roses have sharp thorns.

item-ammonite.name: Ammonite
item-ammonite.description: Octopirate's ancient friend. Used to endure hardships, but not resistant magic.

item-blue-lion-fur.name: Blue Lion Fur
item-blue-lion-fur.description: Beautiful blue lion fur. The sparkling coat and dark blue hue symbolize wisdom.

item-broken-ice-wall.name: Broken Ice Wall
item-broken-ice-wall.description: A piece of Death Wall that's still conscious. Might try to creep up on you sometimes.

item-chest-hair.name: Chest Hair
item-chest-hair.description: A Greater Demon's wild chest hair. So masculine!

item-chimeras-claw.name: Chimera's Claw
item-chimeras-claw.description: A claw of a Chimera. It looks amazing enough to be called the claw of a king.

item-crystal-skull.name: Crystal Skull
item-crystal-skull.description: A crystal in the shape of a skull. Those who love jewels and hate ghosts will be upset by this.

item-cursed-doll.name: Cursed Doll
item-cursed-doll.description: It's scary. Very scary. By the way, who's standing behind you?

item-dragon-bones.name: Dragon Bones
item-dragon-bones.description: Ancient dragon bones. Old, but still quite tough. Used for numerous purposes.

item-dragon-fin.name: Dragon Fin
item-dragon-fin.description: The fin of a legendary dragon. A perfect material that's hard, supple and lightweight.

item-earth-dragon-ash.name: Earth Dragon Ash
item-earth-dragon-ash.description: A mockery of a Earth Dragon ended up like this.

item-earthwyrm-scale.name: Earthwyrm Scale
item-earthwyrm-scale.description: A scale from a legendary earth dragon. Incredibly hard and unable to be scratched.

item-electro-crystal.name: Electro Crystal
item-electro-crystal.description: An electrified crystal found within a Bane Dragon. Don't hold it with your bare hands!

item-fire-dragon-ash.name: Fire Dragon Ash
item-fire-dragon-ash.description: A mockery of a Fire Dragon ended up like this.

item-firewyrm-scale.name: Firewyrm Scale
item-firewyrm-scale.description: A scale from a legendary fire dragon. Strong enough to endure even volcanic eruptions.

item-golem-tablet.name: Golem Tablet
item-golem-tablet.description: A tablet that was once a part of a Golem's body. It has '_METH' written on it, and serves as a source of power.

item-grimoire-scale.name: Grimoire Scale
item-grimoire-scale.description: A scale of the legendary Grimoire. Nobody has ever possessed one. Until now!

item-icy-nose.name: Icy Nose
item-icy-nose.description: A sculpture in the shape of a Crystal Mammoth's trunk. Mammoths love to carry it around.

item-left-rock-shard.name: Left Rock Shard
item-left-rock-shard.description: A shard that Sano gave you as a favor. You didn't take it away by force, right?!

item-legendary-scale.name: Legendary Scale
item-legendary-scale.description: A scale from a legendary fish in the lake. Greatly absorbs HP when used in upgrades.

item-lightning-mane.name: Lightning Mane
item-lightning-mane.description: A mane crackling with electricity. It'll shock you if you touch it.

item-melody-bottle.name: Melody Bottle
item-melody-bottle.description: A small bottle that contains a Siren's voice. Sings an intoxicating melody if opened.

item-moving-branch.name: Moving Branch
item-moving-branch.description: A creepy branch that twitches. Strong in vitality, cutting it only makes it grow.

item-mtgu-plate.name: MTGU Plate
item-mtgu-plate.description: A plate created through science."MTGU" stands for Miserable Trash Garbage Useless. See? Even the name is poorly designed.

item-puppetry-strings.name: Puppetry Strings
item-puppetry-strings.description: Strings that were controlling Marionetta. Not the thread of a spider you saved.

item-raccoon-leaf.name: Raccoon Leaf
item-raccoon-leaf.description: A magical leaf used by wily raccoons. Very handy tool that aids in transformation. Improves weapon's range.

item-rafflesia-petal.name: Rafflesia Petal
item-rafflesia-petal.description: A petal from a rafflesia. It makes a really fancy fan.

item-red-lion-fur.name: Red Lion Fur
item-red-lion-fur.description: Beautiful red lion fur. The burning red color symbolizes strength.

item-right-rock-shard.name: Right Rock Shard
item-right-rock-shard.description: A shard that Uno gave you as a favor. You didn't take it away by force, right?!

item-rune-sphere-shard.name: Rune Sphere Shard
item-rune-sphere-shard.description: A shard made from an enormous amount of crystallized runes. Although just a piece, it has a lot of power.

item-tablet-of-truth.name: Tablet of Truth
item-tablet-of-truth.description: A tablet that was once part of a Golem's body. It has 'EMETH' written on it, and serves as a source of power.

item-throne-of-the-empire.name: Throne of the Empire
item-throne-of-the-empire.description: A picture of the emperor. It goes for a high price in the Sechs Empire.

item-water-dragon-ash.name: Water Dragon Ash
item-water-dragon-ash.description: A mockery of a Water Dragon ended up like this.

item-wind-dragon-tooth.name: Wind Dragon Tooth
item-wind-dragon-tooth.description: According to Venti, she can grow new teeth by using her magic power, but since it's tiring, she hates to do it.

item-accessory-bread.name: Accessory Bread
item-accessory-bread.description: A nicely baked Accessory Bread. Teaches you a recipe appropriate to your skill.

item-cooking-bread.name: Cooking Bread
item-cooking-bread.description: A nicely baked Cooking Bread. Teaches you a recipe appropriate to your skill.

item-farming-bread.name: Farming Bread
item-farming-bread.description: A nicely baked Farming Bread. Teaches you a recipe appropriate to your skill.

item-medicine-bread.name: Medicine Bread
item-medicine-bread.description: A nicely baked Medicine Bread. Teaches you a recipe appropriate to your skill.

item-weapon-bread.name: Weapon Bread
item-weapon-bread.description: A nicely baked Weapon Bread. Teaches you a recipe appropriate to your skill.

item-squid.name: Squid
item-squid.description: A mollusk that's active at night. Uses the fins on its body to swim like its flying in the water.

item-amethyst-brooch.name: Amethyst Brooch
item-amethyst-brooch.description: A brooch with a strangely soothing effect.

item-amethyst-ring.name: Amethyst Ring
item-amethyst-ring.description: The elegance of the amethyst brings a calmness to the atmosphere.

item-anettes-necklace.name: Anette's Necklace
item-anettes-necklace.description: With wearing this necklace, you can move faster. Also, you're kicking up more clouds of dirt. Stop that.

item-aquamarine-brooch.name: Aquamarine Brooch
item-aquamarine-brooch.description: A brooch in the color of the deepest sea.

item-aquamarine-ring.name: Aquamarine Ring
item-aquamarine-ring.description: A roughly cut stone makes this ring quite attractive.

item-art-of-attack.name: Art of Attack
item-art-of-attack.description: A book on the secrets of combat. Generates sonic waves and expands your weapon's target area.

item-art-of-defense.name: Art of Defense
item-art-of-defense.description: A book on the secrets of guarding. Halves time spent flinching, granting its reader a heart of steel.

item-art-of-magic.name: Art of Magic
item-art-of-magic.description: A book on the secrets of spellcasting. Halves non-elemental attacks by way of magic walls.

item-badge.name: Badge
item-badge.description: A vintage, collectible badge given out as a consolation prize.

item-black-ribbon.name: Black Ribbon
item-black-ribbon.description: A black-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look intimidating.

item-blue-ribbon.name: Blue Ribbon
item-blue-ribbon.description: A blue-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look loyal.

item-bone-boots.name: Bone Boots
item-bone-boots.description: Boots made with a combination of hard bones. Though they may look primitive, they're high in defense.

item-bone-shield.name: Bone Shield
item-bone-shield.description: A shield that's both light and hard. Its featherweight nature makes it easy to handle.

item-brand-glasses.name: Brand Glasses
item-brand-glasses.description: A famous designer's brand. Makes you look stylish!

item-bronze-bracelet.name: Bronze Bracelet
item-bronze-bracelet.description: A heavy, bronze bracelet. Raises magic defense for a little bit.

item-cat-ears.name: Cat Ears
item-cat-ears.description: An accessory inspired by a Palm Cat's ears.

item-chain-mail.name: Chain Mail
item-chain-mail.description: With this, straw sandals and a ninja sword on your back, you're on your way to becoming a true warrior!

item-champ-belt.name: Champ Belt
item-champ-belt.description: An honorary belt given to champions. Greatly increases maximum HP.

item-chaos-shield.name: Chaos Shield
item-chaos-shield.description: A shield that goes with the chaos blade. Highly resistant to poison, paralysis, and seals.

item-charm.name: Charm
item-charm.description: A charm from the Far East. Protects you from misfortune by blocking critical hits.

item-cheap-bracelet.name: Cheap Bracelet
item-cheap-bracelet.description: An old, rusty bracelet. Slightly raises magic defense.

item-cotton-cloth.name: Cotton Cloth
item-cotton-cloth.description: Might look like bandages, but they're not. Also not recommended as a chest wrap for women.

item-courage-badge.name: Courage Badge
item-courage-badge.description: Given to those of brave heart and courageous mind. Ain't it the truth!

item-critical-ring.name: Critical Ring
item-critical-ring.description: A ring that raises your chance of landing critical hits. Just by wearing it, you'll know right where to attack.

item-crown.name: Crown
item-crown.description: A classy crown that kings wear.

item-cursed-ring.name: Cursed Ring
item-cursed-ring.description: A cursed ring with spikes that hurt your fingers.

item-dew-pendant.name: Dew Pendant
item-dew-pendant.description: An outdoorsy pendant inspired by dew. Raises attack for farm tools.

item-diamond-brooch.name: Diamond Brooch
item-diamond-brooch.description: A golden brooch with scattered diamonds. Enjoy its smooth lines and beautiful glimmer. Resists all status ailments.

item-diamond-ring.name: Diamond Ring
item-diamond-ring.description: A glittering ring. Protects against sleepiness, fatigue, illness and HP absorption.

item-dolphin-brooch.name: Dolphin Brooch
item-dolphin-brooch.description: A lovely brooch made by a master craftsman. If one of your family equips it, in enhances their status.

item-dragon-cloak.name: Dragon Cloak
item-dragon-cloak.description: A cloak with the symbol of a dragon. Anything with dragons on it is strong, right?

item-earrings.name: Earrings
item-earrings.description: Dangley earrings. They're so cute when they bobble in the breeze.

item-earth-pendant.name: Earth Pendant
item-earth-pendant.description: A pendant inspired by earth. Its bounty boosts the effects of recovery items.

item-earth-ring.name: Earth Ring
item-earth-ring.description: A ring imbued with the magical power of earth. It blocks earth damage, but makes you vunerable to wind damage.

item-element-shield.name: Element Shield
item-element-shield.description: A shield that raises defense against elemental attacks. Lighter than it looks and very easy to use.

item-elvish-cloak.name: Elvish Cloak
item-elvish-cloak.description: A brilliant cloak that is absolutely perfect. Only the beautiful can wear this.

item-emerald-brooch.name: Emerald Brooch
item-emerald-brooch.description: A beautiful emerald brooch with an airy sheen to it.

item-emerald-ring.name: Emerald Ring
item-emerald-ring.description: The bright-shining emerald beautifully adorns your finger.

item-engagement-ring.name: Engagement Ring
item-engagement-ring.description: Use it to propose to your #1 love. Be sure you also prepare a double bed! Well... after they say yes, anyway.

item-fairy-boots.name: Fairy Boots
item-fairy-boots.description: Rare boots made with fairy dust. Very light, but "fairy" tough.

item-fancy-hat.name: Fancy Hat
item-fancy-hat.description: A striking red hat. Breathes quite well, offering superior cranial comfort.

item-fast-step-boots.name: Fast Step Boots
item-fast-step-boots.description: Boots designed for dance practice. Puts a spring in their wearer's step.

item-feather-boots.name: Feather Boots
item-feather-boots.description: Boots made of a light material. Makes you feel like you're walking on air!

item-feathered-hat.name: Feathered Hat
item-feathered-hat.description: A hat with feathers in it. Protects your head and makes you look like an intellectual. Also increases love.

item-field-pendant.name: Field Pendant
item-field-pendant.description: A pendant inspired by the wind. Its scent increases the ability of friendly monsters.

item-fire-ring.name: Fire Ring
item-fire-ring.description: A ring imbued with the magical power of fire. It blocks fire damage, but makes you vunerable to water damage.

item-fireproof-hood.name: Fireproof Hood
item-fireproof-hood.description: Protects your head. Don't push. Don't run. Don't talk. Just stop, drop... and rooooooll...

item-fluffy-scarf.name: Fluffy Scarf
item-fluffy-scarf.description: A scarf made of soft cotton. Very warm. Cuts all RP consumption (with some exceptions).

item-four-dragons-vest.name: Four Dragons' Vest
item-four-dragons-vest.description: A vest blessed by Native Dragons. Can tolerate any attack.

item-four-seasons.name: Four Seasons
item-four-seasons.description: A headdress that makes you feel all seasons. It's for those who have pure, strong, merciful and open hearts.

item-free-farming-shoes.name: Free Farming Shoes
item-free-farming-shoes.description: Shoes for advanced farmers that make it possible to cultivate regardless of the grid lines.

item-ghost-boots.name: Ghost Boots
item-ghost-boots.description: Boots designed to lessen one's weight through principles learned from flying foes. Increases travel speed.

item-gloves.name: Gloves
item-gloves.description: Fine quality leather gloves. Their soft green color is attractive to girls.

item-gold-boots.name: Gold Boots
item-gold-boots.description: Simple golden boots. Wearing them increases defense.

item-gold-bracelet.name: Gold Bracelet
item-gold-bracelet.description: A golden bracelet. Raises magic defense quite considerably.

item-gold-hairpin.name: Gold Hairpin
item-gold-hairpin.description: A traditional craft item from the Far East. Made of finest gold.

item-gold-ring.name: Gold Ring
item-gold-ring.description: Beloved for its simple design. More expensive than silver.

item-green-ribbon.name: Green Ribbon
item-green-ribbon.description: A green-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look environmentally conscious. Possibly hipster.

item-hand-knit-scarf.name: Hand-Knit Scarf
item-hand-knit-scarf.description: A warm, woolen scarf. Halves RP consumption (with some exceptions).

item-happy-ring.name: Happy Ring
item-happy-ring.description: A ring that brings you happiness. Increases your chance of finding items.

item-headband.name: Headband
item-headband.description: A headband from the Far East. Tie it around your forehead when you want to feel awesome.

item-headdress.name: Headdress
item-headdress.description: An accessory that decorates your head. It must be frilly and flashy.

item-heart-pendant.name: Heart Pendant
item-heart-pendant.description: A cute heart-shaped pendant. Warms your heart and increases skill experience gained.

item-heavy-boots.name: Heavy Boots
item-heavy-boots.description: Boots made of steel. Keep you from blowing away, but you'll get tired more easily.

item-heavy-shield.name: Heavy Shield
item-heavy-shield.description: A shield made from layers of silver. Big and tough, it has a high chance of resisting critical hits.

item-heros-proof.name: Hero's Proof
item-heros-proof.description: Proof of almighty power. Slowly recovers HP.

item-holy-amulet.name: Holy Amulet
item-holy-amulet.description: A charm that is said to protect one from danger.

item-ice-skates.name: Ice Skates
item-ice-skates.description: Boots that make you skate around like you're in a rink, anywhere you go. They don't let you jump or spin, though.

item-indigo-ribbon.name: Indigo Ribbon
item-indigo-ribbon.description: An indigo-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look regal.

item-intelligent-glasses.name: Intelligent Glasses
item-intelligent-glasses.description: You look rather more silly than smart in these.

item-iron-geta.name: Iron Geta
item-iron-geta.description: Simple iron footwear. Made for training purposes. Decreases travel speed.

item-iron-shield.name: Iron Shield
item-iron-shield.description: A simple shield made from iron. Wide, so it stops attacks fairly easily.

item-kite-shield.name: Kite Shield
item-kite-shield.description: A shield with high defensive power. Simply shaped, easy to use and highly resistant to knockouts.

item-knight-boots.name: Knight Boots
item-knight-boots.description: Boots with very high defense. Fine quality. Often worn by knights.

item-knight-shield.name: Knight Shield
item-knight-shield.description: Proof of bravery, only borne by a chosen few. Has a very high chance of resisting critical hits.

item-lamellar-vest.name: Lamellar Vest
item-lamellar-vest.description: Armor made from plate-shaped scales. It doesn't impede your speed and also protects you well.

item-leather-belt.name: Leather Belt
item-leather-belt.description: An ordinary leather belt of the sort one can find almost anywhere. Raises defensive skills.

item-leather-boots.name: Leather Boots
item-leather-boots.description: Leather boots made for travelers. Tough and durable.

item-lolita-headdress.name: Lolita Headdress
item-lolita-headdress.description: Gothic Lolita fashion that is popular among some people.

item-lucky-strike.name: Lucky Strike
item-lucky-strike.description: Brings you good luck. Grants a higher than average chance of landing critical hits.

item-magic-charm.name: Magic Charm
item-magic-charm.description: A must-have charm among magic knights. Favors either attack or magic attack -- whichever is stronger.

item-magic-earrings.name: Magic Earrings
item-magic-earrings.description: Earrings made from dazzling magic stones. Makes even the ugliest of earlobes look nice.

item-magic-ring.name: Magic Ring
item-magic-ring.description: A ring imbued with magical power. Speeds up the time needed to charge.

item-magic-shield.name: Magic Shield
item-magic-shield.description: A shield that blocks magic attacks and seals. Best used together with a staff.

item-magical-shield.name: Magical Shield
item-magical-shield.description: High in magic defense and resists status ailments. The crystal in its center reduces magic attacks.

item-monkey-plush.name: Monkey Plush
item-monkey-plush.description: A cute stuffed animal. Sold out in stores due to how terrifyingly cuddly it is.

item-orange-ribbon.name: Orange Ribbon
item-orange-ribbon.description: An orange-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look fun to hang out with.

item-paralysis-ring.name: Paralysis Ring
item-paralysis-ring.description: A ring that not only resists paralysis, but inflicts it on foes as well due to the medicines set into its trim.

item-piyo-sandals.name: Piyo Sandals
item-piyo-sandals.description: Shoes that chirp with every step. They make you want to run around just to see how loud they can get.

item-platinum-bracelet.name: Platinum Bracelet
item-platinum-bracelet.description: A platinum bracelet. Greatly raises magic defense.

item-platinum-mail.name: Platinum Mail
item-platinum-mail.description: A luxurious mail made of platinum.

item-platinum-ring.name: Platinum Ring
item-platinum-ring.description: Beloved for its simple design. This platinum type is rare and hard to find.

item-platinum-shield.name: Platinum Shield
item-platinum-shield.description: A durable shield made of pure platinum. Greatly resists critical hits.

item-poison-ring.name: Poison Ring
item-poison-ring.description: A ring that not only resists poison, but inflicts it on foes as well due to the medicines set into its trim.

item-power-gloves.name: Power Gloves
item-power-gloves.description: Gloves that fit snugly on one's hands. Used to carry heavy things. They're so bad!

item-power-protector.name: Power Protector
item-power-protector.description: A reinforced protector. It will prevent any accidents. Disclaimer: Not to be used when cooking.

item-prism-shield.name: Prism Shield
item-prism-shield.description: A shield that fends off magic attacks. Reduces damage by diffusing magical power. Blocks seals.

item-proof-of-wisdom.name: Proof of Wisdom
item-proof-of-wisdom.description: Proof of almighty wisdom. Slowly recovers RP.

item-protector.name: Protector
item-protector.description: Equipment that prevents accidents before they happen.

item-pumpkin-headgear.name: Pumpkin Headgear
item-pumpkin-headgear.description: A hat made from a pumpkin. The hero of Halloween.

item-purple-ribbon.name: Purple Ribbon
item-purple-ribbon.description: A purple-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look sort of gothic.

item-red-ribbon.name: Red Ribbon
item-red-ribbon.description: A red-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look passionate.

item-rocket-wing.name: Rocket Wing
item-rocket-wing.description: Boots that help you walk faster than ever before. Takes your breath away, so make sure not to pass out!

item-rosary.name: Rosary
item-rosary.description: An accessory bearing a holy cross, used for prayers. Prevents most monsters from appearing at all.

item-round-shield.name: Round Shield
item-round-shield.description: A rounded shield. Used to fend off attacks rather than simply deflecting them.

item-royal-garter.name: Royal Garter
item-royal-garter.description: Makes you feel the dignity of a king.

item-ruby-brooch.name: Ruby Brooch
item-ruby-brooch.description: A brooch shining with ruby-red light. When put under the sun, it glitters like a star.

item-ruby-ring.name: Ruby Ring
item-ruby-ring.description: A ring with a mysterious and alluring design.

item-rune-shield.name: Rune Shield
item-rune-shield.description: A shield made with runes. Not easily damaged, and blocks magic attacks. Halves light and darkness damage.

item-rune-vest.name: Rune Vest
item-rune-vest.description: A vest imbued with the power of runes.

item-sapphire-brooch.name: Sapphire Brooch
item-sapphire-brooch.description: A lovely pink-colored sapphire brooch with a shell motif.

item-sapphire-ring.name: Sapphire Ring
item-sapphire-ring.description: A ring with a beautifully shining inset sapphire.

item-secret-shoes.name: Secret Shoes
item-secret-shoes.description: Boots with secret heels that make you look taller.

item-shield-ring.name: Shield Ring
item-shield-ring.description: A ring used as a shield. Though tough, it only covers a short range. Occasionally reduces damage received to 1.

item-shirt.name: Shirt
item-shirt.description: A plain shirt to wear under clothes. It's made from materials which absorb sweat well.

item-silent-ring.name: Silent Ring
item-silent-ring.description: A ring that not only resists seals, but places them upon foes as well due to the medicines set into its trim.

item-silk-hat.name: Silk Hat
item-silk-hat.description: When you wear this, you might hear a song. No tricks, no gimmicks!

item-silver-boots.name: Silver Boots
item-silver-boots.description: Simple silver boots. Wearing them increases defense.

item-silver-bracelet.name: Silver Bracelet
item-silver-bracelet.description: A silver bracelet. Raises magic defense.

item-silver-hairpin.name: Silver Hairpin
item-silver-hairpin.description: A traditional craft item from the Far East. Worn on the head to ward off evil spirits.

item-silver-pendant.name: Silver Pendant
item-silver-pendant.description: A silver pendant. Simple but elegant in design.

item-silver-ring.name: Silver Ring
item-silver-ring.description: Beloved for its simple design, but otherwise unremarkable.

item-small-shield.name: Small Shield
item-small-shield.description: A small shield, easy to use. Low defense capability.

item-sneaking-boots.name: Sneaking Boots
item-sneaking-boots.description: Boots used to sneak up on unsuspecting foes unnoticed. Allows you to attack monsters before they attack you!

item-snow-boots.name: Snow Boots
item-snow-boots.description: Special boots originally created for wear in snowy regions. They stop you from slipping in any weather!

item-sparkling-shirt.name: Sparkling Shirt
item-sparkling-shirt.description: This is the biggest challenge for people who love clothes. Wearing something like this... Are you out of mind?

item-spectacles.name: Spectacles
item-spectacles.description: People say you look smart with these.

item-star-pendant.name: Star Pendant
item-star-pendant.description: A star-shaped pendant that shines as bright as a real heavenly body. Increases experience gain.

item-stay-up-ring.name: Stay-up Ring
item-stay-up-ring.description: You will no longer yawn with this ring. Hail to short sleepers!

item-step-in-boots.name: Step-In Boots
item-step-in-boots.description: Boots designed to prevent you from executing dash attacks.

item-strange-pendant.name: Strange Pendant
item-strange-pendant.description: This creepy-looking pendant nullifies your defense and magic defense. So, uh, good luck with that.

item-straw-hat.name: Straw Hat
item-straw-hat.description: A hat great for summer. It feels good because it lets the heat out.

item-strider-boots.name: Strider Boots
item-strider-boots.description: Boots that help you take bigger steps. Lengthens your invincibility when dashing.

item-sun-pendant.name: Sun Pendant
item-sun-pendant.description: A sun-shaped pendant. Increases companions' abilities with its light.

item-talisman.name: Talisman
item-talisman.description: A type of protective charm. Reverses status effects such as poison, paralysis, fatigue and cold.

item-throwing-ring.name: Throwing Ring
item-throwing-ring.description: You can throw an item far away with this ring.

item-turnip-headgear.name: Turnip Headgear
item-turnip-headgear.description: A hat made from a turnip. It was once used during Halloween, but it got replaced by a pumpkin.

item-turtle-shield.name: Turtle Shield
item-turtle-shield.description: A shield made by combining turtle shells. Very heavy, and often used in training. Resists being blown away.

item-umbrella.name: Umbrella
item-umbrella.description: An expensive umbrella. Mainly meant for use as a parasol, but works against rain, too!

item-vest.name: Vest
item-vest.description: Fancy clothing that keeps you warm. Also called a waistcoat.

item-water-ring.name: Water Ring
item-water-ring.description: A ring imbued with the magical power of water. It blocks water damage, but makes you vunerable to fire damage.

item-water-shoes.name: Water Shoes
item-water-shoes.description: Footwear used by Ninja of the Far East. Helps you walk on water.

item-wet-boots.name: Wet Boots
item-wet-boots.description: Boots that are wet and slippery. Their natural power helps you land critical hits.

item-white-ribbon.name: White Ribbon
item-white-ribbon.description: A white-colored ribbon. Those who wear it should probably avoid eating spaghetti.

item-wind-cloak.name: Wind Cloak
item-wind-cloak.description: A cloak imbued with the element of wind. Don't get any bright ideas and start jumping off buildings, though.

item-wind-ring.name: Wind Ring
item-wind-ring.description: A ring imbued with the magical power of wind. It blocks wind damage, but makes you vunerable to earth damage.

item-turbot-sashimi.description: Freshly sliced turbot. The edges are very tasty.

item-turnip-heaven.name: Turnip Heaven
item-turnip-heaven.description: Turnips from three corners of the globe, gathered together into a turnip paradise. Try to eat all three at once!

item-udon.name: Udon
item-udon.description: Thick and firm noodles. Very smooth and easy to eat.

item-ultimate-curry.name: Ultimate Curry
item-ultimate-curry.description: The fruit of intense efforts to create the greatest curry. Perfect in many ways.

item-union-stew.name: Union Stew
item-union-stew.description: Various ingredients boiled in one large pot. People surround the pot and eat it together. Teamwork, ho!

item-vegetable-juice.name: Vegetable Juice
item-vegetable-juice.description: A healthy juice made from various vegetables. Bitter but strangely addictive.

item-veggie-smoothie.name: Veggie Smoothie
item-veggie-smoothie.description: Vegetables mixed with milk, softening the bitterness.

item-yam-of-the-ages.name: Yam of the Ages
item-yam-of-the-ages.description: Pureed yam mixed with butter and milk, shaped and baked. Sweet and savory.

item-yellowtail-sashimi.name: Yellowtail Sashimi
item-yellowtail-sashimi.description: Freshly sliced yellowtail. Fatty and rich in taste.

item-yogurt.name: Yogurt
item-yogurt.description: Made by processing milk. It eases upset stomachs.

item-10-fold-steel.name: 10-Fold Steel
item-10-fold-steel.description: The rarest steel among Double Steels. Multiples the effect of the material used to previously reinforce an item.

item-ancient-orc-cloth.name: Ancient Orc Cloth
item-ancient-orc-cloth.description: An orc's cloth that is described as legendary cloth sometimes. But a cloth is a cloth, and an orc is an orc.

item-arrowhead.name: Arrowhead
item-arrowhead.description: Rusty and useless as-is, but might shine if polished. Kind of like humanity...

item-big-birds-comb.name: Big Bird's Comb
item-big-birds-comb.description: A big cock's comb. When you get mad, just try to "comb" down.

item-big-giants-nail.name: Big Giant's Nail
item-big-giants-nail.description: A huge fingernail from big giants. Even grosser!

item-birds-feather.name: Bird's Feather
item-birds-feather.description: A soft feather that's prickly at the base and pointy on one end.

item-black-bird-feather.name: Black Bird Feather
item-black-bird-feather.description: A soft black feather. The quill is rather sharp.

item-black-scale.name: Black Scale
item-black-scale.description: A dragon's scale. You feel darkness emanating from it.

item-blade-shard.name: Blade Shard
item-blade-shard.description: A small piece of a blade from a knife or something. Don't touch it with your bare hands.

item-blk-tortoise-shell.name: Blk. Tortoise Shell
item-blk-tortoise-shell.description: A shell that is extremely hard. You need to be skilled enough to work on this.

item-blue-core.name: Blue Core
item-blue-core.description: A blue crystal that has magic power. Makes you feel calm

item-blue-giants-glove.name: Blue Giant's Glove
item-blue-giants-glove.description: A glove used by a Blue giant. Almost impossible to tear apart. Why you would even try, I have no idea.

item-blue-scale.name: Blue Scale
item-blue-scale.description: An ocean-blue dragon's scale. It makes you feel intelligent just holding it.

item-broken-box.name: Broken Box
item-broken-box.description: An old wooden box. Get inside and pretend its a spaceship!

item-broken-hilt.name: Broken Hilt
item-broken-hilt.description: A broken piece of hilt. Fits nicely in the hand.

item-bulls-horn.name: Bull's Horn
item-bulls-horn.description: A sharp and dangerous horn. Worth a lot if its unscratched.

item-cheap-cloth.name: Cheap Cloth
item-cheap-cloth.description: A poor-quality swatch of cloth. Unstitches when you so much as breathe on it.

item-cheap-propeller.name: Cheap Propeller
item-cheap-propeller.description: A cheap-looking propeller used as a weapon. Being poor is not sad, but this is sad.

item-crimson-scale.name: Crimson Scale
item-crimson-scale.description: A dragon scale the color of flames.

item-dangerous-scissors.name: Dangerous Scissors
item-dangerous-scissors.description: Scissors that look dangerous. But dangerous means sexy, some people say. Just don't run with them

item-dark-crystal.name: Dark Crystal
item-dark-crystal.description: Crystallized darkness magic. Turns everything light to dark.

item-devil-blood.name: Devil Blood
item-devil-blood.description: Life's blood collected from demons. Valued as medicine.

item-devil-horn.name: Devil Horn
item-devil-horn.description: A horn of a demon. Filled with magical power.

item-double-steel.name: Double Steel
item-double-steel.description: Special steel that doubles the effect of the material used to previously reinforce an item.

item-dragon-fang.name: Dragon Fang
item-dragon-fang.description: A hard fang strong enough to leave tooth marks on iron.

item-dragon-scale.name: Dragon Scale
item-dragon-scale.description: One of many scales that cover a dragon's body. Diamond hard, and also effective as a charm.

item-fairy-dust.name: Fairy Dust
item-fairy-dust.description: Fairy dust that sparkles at night.

item-fairy-elixir.name: Fairy Elixir
item-fairy-elixir.description: Secret fairy item. Fairies are considered full-fledged sprites when they have this.

item-fire-crystal.name: Fire Crystal
item-fire-crystal.description: Crystallized fire magic. Extremely hot. Must not be touched with bare hands.

item-fish-fossil.name: Fish Fossil
item-fish-fossil.description: An ancient fish fossil. Some collectors would kill to find one!

item-ghost-hood.name: Ghost Hood
item-ghost-hood.description: A hood that covers the head. Special material with spooky powers.

item-glistening-blade.name: Glistening Blade
item-glistening-blade.description: A blade of a scythe. It's glistening.

item-glitter-scale.name: Glitter Scale
item-glitter-scale.description: It glitters and shines. Mesmerizing. Like tinfoil.

item-glue.name: Glue
item-glue.description: An adhesive made from boiled animal skin. Teacher will get mad if she catches you eating it.

item-gold-wolf-fang.name: Gold Wolf Fang
item-gold-wolf-fang.description: A sharp fang that glitters. It takes any prey down with one bite.

item-golem-spirit-stone.name: Golem Spirit Stone
item-golem-spirit-stone.description: A stone with a mark to activate a Golem. The spirit is unchanging forever.

item-golem-stone.name: Golem Stone
item-golem-stone.description: A stone with a mark to activate a Golem. The mark might just come off if you rub it.

item-great-hammer-shard.name: Great Hammer Shard
item-great-hammer-shard.description: A shard of a broken hammer that used to be a legendary weapon.

item-green-core.name: Green Core
item-green-core.description: A green crystal with magic power. Makes you more kindly for some reason.

item-gunpowder.name: Gunpowder
item-gunpowder.description: Gunpowder for fire arrows. Explosive and dangerous. Handle with care.

item-hammer-piece.name: Hammer Piece
item-hammer-piece.description: A piece of broken hammer. Gotta be useful for something, right?

item-holy-spore.name: Holy Spore
item-holy-spore.description: A spore that is very rare. It is said the spore goes to Gandhara when it disperses.

item-insect-carapace.name: Insect Carapace
item-insect-carapace.description: The carapace of an insect. Light but tough.

item-insect-horn.name: Insect Horn
item-insect-horn.description: A jagged insect horn that has a patchy pattern.

item-insect-jaw.name: Insect Jaw
item-insect-jaw.description: A monster jaw strong enough to chew just about anything.

item-ivory-tusk.name: Ivory Tusk
item-ivory-tusk.description: The discarded tusk of an elephant. Beautiful and easy to work. It's shed and regrown.

item-love-crystal.name: Love Crystal
item-love-crystal.description: Crystallized love that brings happiness. Generously lets you take your foes' HP when you attack.

item-love-scale.name: Love Scale
item-love-scale.description: A scale that is famous as a love charm. But only few people have ever seen it because of its rarity.

item-magic.name: Magic
item-magic.description: An elixir with magic power. It's necessary for wizards.

item-magic-claw.name: Magic Claw
item-magic-claw.description: A sharp claw with magic power. It's the best to equip it with an animal suit.

item-magic-crystal.name: Magic Crystal
item-magic-crystal.description: Crystallized magic. Often dissolved before use.

item-magic-powder.name: Magic Powder
item-magic-powder.description: Magically-infused powder. Water-soluble and has many uses.

item-malm-claw.name: Malm Claw
item-malm-claw.description: It's sharp. It hurts. Also, it's blue.

item-mysterious-powder.name: Mysterious Powder
item-mysterious-powder.description: A.k.a. Zombie Powder. It's veiled in mystery. Undead mystery.

item-old-bandage.name: Old Bandage
item-old-bandage.description: Tattered bandage that's basically falling apart. Kind of grody.

item-paralysis-poison.name: Paralysis Poison
item-paralysis-poison.description: Toxic liquid that can paralyze you or poison you, depending on your luck. Or lack of luck.

item-penguin-down.name: Penguin Down
item-penguin-down.description: Down from an emperor penguin. "Emperor" is not their title, but their name.

item-pirates-armor.name: Pirate's Armor
item-pirates-armor.description: A shoulder guard made of steel.

item-plant-stem.name: Plant Stem
item-plant-stem.description: Strong and thick plant stem used for various purposes.

item-poison-king.name: Poison King
item-poison-king.description: Liquid that is very toxic. Just one lick is fatal. So stop licking it!

item-poison-powder.name: Poison Powder
item-poison-powder.description: Poisonous powder used to add poison to weapons and equipment. Leon might like it. Weirdo.

item-pretty-carapace.name: Pretty Carapace
item-pretty-carapace.description: The carapace of an insect. Dappled and beautiful.

item-pretty-thread.name: Pretty Thread
item-pretty-thread.description: A shiny thread commonly used to make fabric. Comes from a spider's butt.

item-proof-of-rank.name: Proof of Rank
item-proof-of-rank.description: Proof that you are in a high position. If you lose it...well, it's over.

item-quality-cloth.name: Quality Cloth
item-quality-cloth.description: A cloth of fine quality. Its fabric is tough and not easily torn.

item-quality-fur.name: Quality Fur
item-quality-fur.description: Warm, soft and shiny fur. Raises resistance to knockouts when used in upgrades.

item-quality-propeller.name: Quality Propeller
item-quality-propeller.description: A well-made propeller used as a weapon. It's obvious that the company had lots of assets when they made this.

item-quality-puffy-fur.name: Quality Puffy Fur
item-quality-puffy-fur.description: Really puffy fur. Like, the puffiest of puff. It's really puffy for sure!

item-quality-worn-cloth.name: Quality Worn Cloth
item-quality-worn-cloth.description: Used to be high-quality cloth, but it's worn out from overuse.

item-queens-jaw.name: Queen's Jaw
item-queens-jaw.description: A jaw that chews everything up except for diamonds. Diamonds are forever!

item-red-core.name: Red Core
item-red-core.description: A green crystal with magic power. Makes you energetic.

item-rigid-horn.name: Rigid Horn
item-rigid-horn.description: A jagged and dappled horn. Looks dangerous.

item-root.name: Root
item-root.description: Tree root used in crafting. Can be used in weapons or ground into medicine.

item-scorpion-pincer.name: Scorpion Pincer
item-scorpion-pincer.description: Pincers that can easily cut through branches. They hurt, like, sooo much.

item-scorpion-tail.name: Scorpion Tail
item-scorpion-tail.description: A highly poisonous scorpion tail. Handle with care!

item-shiny-screw.name: Shiny Screw
item-shiny-screw.description: A screw from something. People get upset if they find a screw left after making something.

item-shoulder-piece.name: Shoulder Piece
item-shoulder-piece.description: Rough, wooden shoulder piece. Not terribly exciting.

item-silk-cloth.name: Silk Cloth
item-silk-cloth.description: A smooth, silky cloth. Go ahead and rub your face in it. Doesn't it feel nice?

item-skull.name: Skull
item-skull.description: A creepy skull. Some people love this kind of stuff, though.

item-spiders-thread.name: Spider's Thread
item-spiders-thread.description: An elastic string that's hard to break. Comes from a spider's butt.

item-spore.name: Spore
item-spore.description: A mushroom spore. Could it be an ancient menace from outer space?!

item-stick.name: Stick
item-stick.description: A thin stick that can be used for materials. You could poke things with it too, I guess.

item-strong-vine.name: Strong Vine
item-strong-vine.description: A long, thin, strong vine. Can be wrapped and banded.

item-thick-stick.name: Thick Stick
item-thick-stick.description: A thick stick that can be used for materials, but is not a substitute for lumber. At least you can smack people upside the head with it and laugh!

item-thunderbird-feather.name: Thunderbird Feather
item-thunderbird-feather.description: A soft-textured feather that contains electricity.

item-tiny-golem-stone.name: Tiny Golem Stone
item-tiny-golem-stone.description: A stone with a mark to activate a Golem. The mark is so minuscule, the one who wrote it must be a craftsman.

item-turnips-miracle.name: Turnip's Miracle
item-turnips-miracle.description: A mysterious item that is said to show the order of the world. The root of dreams.

item-turtle-shell.name: Turtle Shell
item-turtle-shell.description: A hard turtle shell. Good when you want to make something hard. (Hey, get your mind out of the gutter!)

item-unbroken-ivory-tusk.name: Unbroken Ivory Tusk
item-unbroken-ivory-tusk.description: The discarded tusk of a mammoth. It doesn't break, but it sheds and regrows. Even if 100 people step on it, it won't break.

item-vine.name: Vine
item-vine.description: A long, thin vine hat can be used to tie down, wind about, and otherwise constrict things.

item-warriors-proof.name: Warrior's Proof
item-warriors-proof.description: A proof handed down among warrior tribes. Awarded by chiefs when a warrior attains manhood.

item-water-crystal.name: Water Crystal
item-water-crystal.description: Crystallized water magic. Easily broken, so must be handled with care.

item-wind-crystal.name: Wind Crystal
item-wind-crystal.description: Crystallized wind magic. Constantly cushioned in fierce, ravaging winds.

item-wolf-fang.name: Wolf Fang
item-wolf-fang.description: A sharp fang that can instantly kill prey with a single bite.

item-wooly-furball.name: Wooly Furball
item-wooly-furball.description: Fur dropped by a Wooly. Inconceivably soft.

item-yellow-core.name: Yellow Core
item-yellow-core.description: A yellow crystal suffused with magic power. Makes you feel cheerful.

item-yellow-down.name: Yellow Down
item-yellow-down.description: Soft, feathery duck down. Looks outstanding.

item-yellow-feather.name: Yellow Feather
item-yellow-feather.description: A soft-textured yellow feather. It's believed to bring happiness.

item-blowfish.name: Blowfish
item-blowfish.description: Known as one of the most expensive fish. Filled with poison, requiring high skill to cook safely.

item-boot.name: Boot
item-boot.description: An old boot that was found floating in the water. Worn-out and useless.

item-can.name: Can
item-can.description: An empty can that someone tossed aside. Don't follow suit -- Littering is bad!

item-char.name: Char
item-char.description: A fish people just love to catch. Prefers swimming in old water.

item-cherry-salmon.name: Cherry Salmon
item-cherry-salmon.description: A small freshwater fish. Found in various places due to its popularity -- it's often "stocked".

item-chub.name: Chub
item-chub.description: A fish with a dark line on its body. During spawning season, it developrs two more lines.

item-crucian-carp.name: Crucian Carp
item-crucian-carp.description: Matures fast, and also lives long. Mostly eats plankton. Requires both skill and luck to catch.

item-fall-flounder.name: Fall Flounder
item-fall-flounder.description: A fish that looks like fallen leaves. When seen swimming, you'd like there's debris floating by.

item-flounder.name: Flounder
item-flounder.description: A fish with both eyes on the left side of its body. Has a larger mouth and sharper teeth than a Turbot.

item-gibelio.name: Gibelio
item-gibelio.description: Displayers unique breeding characteristics due to females outnumbering the males. Found in quiet rivers.

item-girella.name: Girella
item-girella.description: A winter fish caught in the ocean. Easy to find, but renowned for its powerful pull.

item-glitter-snapper.name: Glitter Snapper
item-glitter-snapper.description: A fish with a body of glittering silver. Very easy to spot, but hard to catch.

item-lamp-squid.name: Lamp Squid
item-lamp-squid.description: A squid with a lamp-shaped body. The lamp holds poison with a sealing effect, so it must be cooked with caution.

item-lobster.name: Lobster
item-lobster.description: A giant shrimp with walking legs. Its two large front claws are used to threaten enemies.

item-mackerel.name: Mackerel
item-mackerel.description: Spoils easily. Often grilled or boiled, and often for a long time in order to disguise that it has spoiled. Tsk tsk!

item-masu-trout.name: Masu Trout
item-masu-trout.description: One of the most common fish. Mostly found in rivers, but sometimes also found out at sea.

item-needlefish.name: Needlefish
item-needlefish.description: Swims near the water's surface with its tiny, thin body. Has an aqua-colored back and a white belly.

item-pike.name: Pike
item-pike.description: Named after its slim, long, and slender body. A popular fall fish that's full of nutrients.

item-pond-smelt.name: Pond Smelt
item-pond-smelt.description: Thin and small, but adaptive, with a large habitat. Most often found during ice fishing.

item-rainbow-trout.name: Rainbow Trout
item-rainbow-trout.description: A mid-sized fish that lives in rivers. Very poisonous. During spawning season, the males shine in rainbow colors.

item-rare-can.name: Rare Can
item-rare-can.description: A rare can that's no longer manufactured. Worth a lot among collectors.

item-rockfish.name: Rockfish
item-rockfish.description: A unique fish that swims in the sand. Has a hard head that can crush even rocks.

item-salmon.name: Salmon
item-salmon.description: Spends most of its time in the ocean, but swims upstream to spawn in the river. Used in many recipes.

item-sand-flounder.name: Sand Flounder
item-sand-flounder.description: A unique fish that swims in the sand. Gets nutrition from small minerals, making its body firm and sandy.

item-sardine.name: Sardine
item-sardine.description: A fairly easy fish to catch. Swims in shoals, and is often viewed as a beautiful, tasty delight.

item-shrimp.name: Shrimp
item-shrimp.description: A type of crustacean with its body protected by a hard shell. Has 13 pairs of legs.

item-skipjack.name: Skipjack
item-skipjack.description: A fall fish that requires power and skill to catch.

item-snapper.name: Snapper
item-snapper.description: A fish known to bring good luck. Has long been served in festivals and ceremonies.

item-sunsquid.name: Sunsquid
item-sunsquid.description: A squid from the tropics. Has a tanned body and swims in shallow water.

item-taimen.name: Taimen
item-taimen.description: The largest freshwater salmonid. Very rare and valued.

item-throbby-snapper.name: Throbby Snapper
item-throbby-snapper.description: A rare type of snapper that's considered legendary among fishermen.

item-tuna.name: Tuna
item-tuna.description: A large and tasty fish that's widely loved. Traded at high prices and generally found in deep waters.

item-turbot.name: Turbot
item-turbot.description: A fish with both eyes situated on the right side of its body. Changes color depending on its environment.

item-yellowtail.name: Yellowtail
item-yellowtail.description: A stock name given to numerous varieties of fish. All have large bodies and are renowned for bringing good luck.

item-round-stone.name: Round Stone
item-round-stone.description: turned around after years of polishing under a waterfall.

item-acutorimass.name: Acutorimass
item-acutorimass.description: Cooking ladles reinforced as weapons. For some reason there are two.

item-aerial-blade.name: Aerial Blade
item-aerial-blade.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of wind. Its magical power makes it lighter than other swords.

item-algernon.name: Algernon
item-algernon.description: A staff of flowers given to someone. For some reason, handling it makes you feel extra sharp.

item-alldale.name: Alldale
item-alldale.description: An axe with two golden blades. Called angel wings, they are both strong and beautiful.

item-amethyst-rod.name: Amethyst Rod
item-amethyst-rod.description: A staff decorated with purple amethysts. Many of the wizards who have this rod are attractive, mature people.

item-animal-puppets.name: Animal Puppets
item-animal-puppets.description: A useful tool to have when performing a skit alone, but as a weapon...

item-aqua-sword.name: Aqua Sword
item-aqua-sword.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of water. Its blade is always wet.

item-aquamarine-rod.name: Aquamarine Rod
item-aquamarine-rod.description: A staff decorated with an ocean blue stone.

item-axe.name: Axe
item-axe.description: Originally a farming axe, it's excited to join you in battle. Its name is Meryl. And it likes you... for now.

item-back-scratcher.name: Back Scratcher
item-back-scratcher.description: A sword (?) used to scratch itchy backs. Maybe your foes will freak out when they see it?

item-balmung.name: Balmung
item-balmung.description: A long sword with sleek lines. Though it's big, it's designed to be aerodynamic and easy to handle.

item-basilisk-fang.name: Basalisk Fang
item-basilisk-fang.description: A weapon that can cut through anything as if it were cloth. Has a paralyzing effect.

item-basket.name: Basket
item-basket.description: A basket that fits more than you'd think. Be careful not to leave things inside when fighting or they might spill!

item-bat.name: Bat
item-bat.description: A wooden bat used in baseball. Only kids in striped shirts make a weapon like this their first choice.

item-battle-axe.name: Battle Axe
item-battle-axe.description: An axe with a great deal of force behind it. Must be used carefully. Has a higher chance of landing critical hits.

item-battle-hammer.name: Battle Hammer
item-battle-hammer.description: A hammer well suited to blowing foes away -- or at least knocking them out.

item-battle-scythe.name: Battle Scythe
item-battle-scythe.description: An axe with an extremely sharp blade. Much bigger and sharper than a farming sickle.

item-bazal-katar.name: Bazal Katar
item-bazal-katar.description: A foreign weapon that looks like a sword. Actually, it's called a jamadhar.

item-bear-claws.name: Bear Claws
item-bear-claws.description: A weapon that looks like the claws of a bear.

item-beginners-pole.name: Beginner's Pole
item-beginners-pole.description: A pole for beginners. Can be charged to attract fish from far away.

item-belvarose.name: Belvarose
item-belvarose.description: Spear with spikes at the end. Requires skill to use, but as you grow accustomed to it, you can easily land knockouts.

item-belzebuth.name: Belzebuth
item-belzebuth.description: Short-ranged, but has magical power strong enough to steal an enemy's life. High chance of landing critical hits.

item-big-knife.name: Big Knife
item-big-knife.description: A knife with a large blade. So large, in fact, that one cannot easily cut apples with it. Unless they're REALLY BIG.

item-bio-smasher.name: Bio Smasher
item-bio-smasher.description: A poisoned long sword with jagged edges. Designed to spread poison thoroughly.

item-bjor.name: Bjor
item-bjor.description: A spear drenched with all available poisons. Has various effects.

item-blessed-hoe.name: Blessed Hoe
item-blessed-hoe.description: A hoe so strong that the soil is all like, thank you, may I have another? Really wide coverage when charged.

item-blood-lance.name: Blood Lance
item-blood-lance.description: A cursed spear. Its two blades remind you of a warlock.

item-blue-eyed-blade.name: Blue-Eyed Blade
item-blue-eyed-blade.description: Makes its bearer's eyes shine blue, and grants the power to see an opponent's skill. Increases critical hit chance.

item-bone-hammer.name: Bone Hammer
item-bone-hammer.description: A light but strong hammer made from bones.

item-brass-knuckles.name: Brass Knuckles
item-brass-knuckles.description: A lethal weapon mainly used by Goblin gangs.

item-braveheart.name: Braveheart
item-braveheart.description: A rare long sword with a glittering blade. Its bearer's courage gives it strength.

item-brionac.name: Brionac
item-brionac.description: A spear so strong that it can penetrate anything. According to legend, it made a hole in the mountains with one stab!

item-broadsword.name: Broadsword
item-broadsword.description: A light, easy-to-use sword. Recommended for beginners. Some even use it for cooking.

item-broken-wall.name: Broken Wall
item-broken-wall.description: Dual blades imbued with earth power. So hard that they can smash rocks to pieces.

item-bubble-staff.name: Bubble Staff
item-bubble-staff.description: A staff that produces millions of bubbles. It must be popular among children. Don't be so mean. Lend it to them.

item-burning-sword.name: Burning Sword
item-burning-sword.description: A sword with a fiery blade. One touch and you'll be burned.

item-caestus.name: Caestus
item-caestus.description: It's said that ancient boxers used them.

item-caliburn.name: Caliburn
item-caliburn.description: A legendary calorie-burning sword. Few believe it actually exists. But here it is!

item-cat-punch.name: Cat Punch
item-cat-punch.description: A weapon in the shape of a cat's paws. Although it looks soft, the claw part seriously hurts.

item-chaos-blade.name: Chaos Blade
item-chaos-blade.description: Companion to the Chaos Shield. Chooses its bearer with its magical power.

item-chaos-edge.name: Chaos Edge
item-chaos-edge.description: Dual blades imbued with magical power. Has a paralyzing effect.

item-cheap-axe.name: Cheap Axe
item-cheap-axe.description: An old, rusty axe. Too old to be charged.

item-cheap-hammer.name: Cheap Hammer
item-cheap-hammer.description: An old, rusty hammer. Too old to be charged. Used to flatten soil.

item-cheap-hoe.name: Cheap Hoe
item-cheap-hoe.description: An old, rusty hoe. You can till the fields with it. Its blade is chipped.

item-cheap-pole.name: Cheap Pole
item-cheap-pole.description: An old, rusty fishing pole. So old that it might break if the fish is too large.

item-cheap-sickle.name: Cheap Sickle
item-cheap-sickle.description: An old, rusty sickle. Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

item-cheap-waterpot.name: Cheap Waterpot
item-cheap-waterpot.description: An old, rusted waterpot. You can water the fields with it. Press the B Button repeatedly to water as you walk.

item-chopping-axe.name: Chopping Axe
item-chopping-axe.description: A sturdy bronze axe. Can be charged to cover wider areas.

item-claymore.name: Claymore
item-claymore.description: A long sword that's easy to swing. Has a fun ring on it that you can play with. (But don't try it at home!)

item-corsesca.name: Corsesca
item-corsesca.description: A spear with a wide blade. Its shape was decided after many experiments trying to forge a high-accuracy blade.

item-crescent-axe.name: Crescent Axe
item-crescent-axe.description: An axe with a sleek edge. Its center is unbalanced, however, so it's hard to hold it straight.

item-crimson-staff.name: Crimson Staff
item-crimson-staff.description: A blood-colored staff. And no, it wasn't painted with real blood. It's just dye made from insects.

item-crystal-hammer.name: Crystal Hammer
item-crystal-hammer.description: A hammer imbued with water power. Its hard head and spikes cause major damage.

item-cutlass.name: Cutlass
item-cutlass.description: An old sword that belonged to pirates. Sailors carry them as charms.

item-cyclone-blade.name: Cyclone Blade
item-cyclone-blade.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of wind. Its thin blade has small holes in it to allow for air to pass through.

item-cyclone-rod.name: Cyclone Rod
item-cyclone-rod.description: A staff that has the power of wind. It produces high suction power which is used as a cleaning tool in another world.

item-daicone.name: Daicone
item-daicone.description: A daikon radish so long and strong that it became a viable weapon. It dreamed big.

item-dancing-dicer.name: Dancing Dicer
item-dancing-dicer.description: A weapon brought from the Far East. With its sharp edges, you can sometimes cut down foes in a single blow.

item-dark-invitation.name: Dark Invitation
item-dark-invitation.description: Magical soul-eating swords. They can end the lives of their targets in a single instant.

item-deep-blizzard.name: Deep Blizzard
item-deep-blizzard.description: Dual blades so cold that all water around them freezes on contact. As such, its blades tend to change shape a lot.

item-defender.name: Defender
item-defender.description: A sword designed to be used with a shield. Raises resistance toward incoming attacks and knockouts.

item-dekash.name: Dekash
item-dekash.description: Smells like fish, so it tends to attract fish.

item-demon-axe.name: Demon Axe
item-demon-axe.description: An axe possessed by an evil spirit since it cut down a cursed tree.

item-desert-wind.name: Desert Wind
item-desert-wind.description: Dual blade designs inspired by desert winds. Popular for their beauty and strength.

item-devil-finger.name: Devil Finger
item-devil-finger.description: A weapon that leaves scars said to resemble scratches from the devil's nails. Has the power to absorb life.

item-diamond-rod.name: Diamond Rod
item-diamond-rod.description: Although it's the king of jewels, the only thing people care about is its hardness. And it IS very hard.

item-double-edge.name: Double Edge
item-double-edge.description: A well-balanced axe with double blades. Highly regarded for its strength and ease of use.

item-double-scratch.name: Double Scratch
item-double-scratch.description: Dual blades used to soothe itchy backs With two at your disposal, your whole back is covered!

item-dragon-claws.name: Dragon Claws
item-dragon-claws.description: A weapon made from dragon claws. Can even cut steel.

item-dragon-slayer.name: Dragon Slayer
item-dragon-slayer.description: A sword in the shape of three dragon heads. The three often fight over who's the best.

item-dragons-fang.name: Dragon's Fang
item-dragons-fang.description: A spear as sharp as a dragon fang. The blade vibrates faster as danger approaches.

item-dragoon-claw.name: Dragoon Claw
item-dragoon-claw.description: Dual blades in the shape of three dragon heads. The three on the left blade stop the other three from fighting.

item-durendal.name: Durendal
item-durendal.description: A sword with a shining blade. You can attack your foes while they're captivated by its radiant beauty.

item-earnest-edge.name: Earnest Edge
item-earnest-edge.description: In the hands of an expert, these long blades can win a fight without taking a hit.

item-earth-shade.name: Earth Shade
item-earth-shade.description: A sword blessed by mother nature. Has an interesting design that looks kind of like a fault line.

item-earth-staff.name: Earth Staff
item-earth-staff.description: A staff imbued with the magic power of earth. Strong enough to shake the ground.

item-efreet.name: Efreet
item-efreet.description: High-heat dual blades that generate heat waves. Legends say they once caused an entire sea to evaporate.

item-elvish-harp.name: Elvish Harp
item-elvish-harp.description: A beautiful and well-made harp. Created by famous elvish craftsmen. You can play, sing, and hit enemies with it.

item-emerald-edge.name: Emerald Edge
item-emerald-edge.description: Dual blades reinforced countless times. The increase to their magic power gives them a green tint.

item-emerald-rod.name: Emerald Rod
item-emerald-rod.description: Bright green is a symbol of calmness. This rod makes you look intelligent and cool.

item-executioner.name: Executioner
item-executioner.description: An axe with a sketchy past. Was imbued with dark power while trying to raise its attack.

item-famous-pole.name: Famous Pole
item-famous-pole.description: A pole for master fishers. Can be charged to attract fish from far away.

item-fatal-crush.name: Fatal Crush
item-fatal-crush.description: A hammer way beyond standard size. Long-ranged, and has a high chance of landing critical hits.

item-feather-lance.name: Feather Lance
item-feather-lance.description: A spear imbued with the magic power of wind. Lift it up to the sky and it will pierce the heavens.

item-fenrir.name: Fenrir
item-fenrir.description: A weapon in the shape of a wolf-like monster that can swallow gods.

item-fists-of-dark.name: Fists of Dark
item-fists-of-dark.description: Evil iron gauntlets. This is the power gained by giving your heart to the dark side.

item-fists-of-fire.name: Fists of Fire
item-fists-of-fire.description: Burning iron gauntlets. We are all friends after a fight!

item-fists-of-light.name: Fists of Light
item-fists-of-light.description: Shiny iron gauntlets. So bright they make you want sunglasses.

item-fists-of-the-earth.name: Fists of the Earth
item-fists-of-the-earth.description: Heavy iron gauntlets. They make you feel powerful and grounded.

item-fists-of-water.name: Fists of Water
item-fists-of-water.description: Cold iron gauntlets. They can deliver merciless blows.

item-fists-of-wind.name: Fists of Wind
item-fists-of-wind.description: Sharp iron gauntlets. It's important to draw your punches quickly for maximum effect.

item-fivestaff.name: Fivestaff
item-fivestaff.description: A long-ranged lance that seems almost as if it were made of blades, from tip to handle. Can also be swung.

item-flamberge.name: Flamberge
item-flamberge.description: A sword with a uniquely shaped blade. So beautiful, it's often used in ceremonies.

item-flame-hammer.name: Flame Hammer
item-flame-hammer.description: A hammer with fire power on one side. The flame helps enhance its damage output.

item-flame-saber.name: Flame Saber
item-flame-saber.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of fire. A single swing will make you drip with sweat. Kind of icky to use, really.

item-flare-lance.name: Flare Lance
item-flare-lance.description: A spear that lets out high heat. The closer to the tip, the hotter it gets. Perhaps it can cure back pain.

item-flare-staff.name: Flare Staff
item-flare-staff.description: A staff imbued with the magic power of fire. The head is very hot and tends to spark a lot. Hey, that rhymes!

item-force-divide.name: Force Divide
item-force-divide.description: Dual blades imbued with both fire and water energies. The temperature difference increases the damage dealt.

item-force-element.name: Force Element
item-force-element.description: A lighted long sword. Contains strong elemental power, making it hard to use.

item-friendly-rod.name: Friendly Rod
item-friendly-rod.description: A staff of friendship. "We should be good friends

item-frost-axe.name: Frost Axe
item-frost-axe.description: An axe with an icy cold blade. Freezes while it cuts, ensuring less pain for more humane murdering.

item-frost-edge.name: Frost Edge
item-frost-edge.description: Two swords emanating cool air. Not for people who are overly sensitive to the cold.

item-gae-bolg.name: Gae Bolg
item-gae-bolg.description: A fierce spear with a trident-like shape. Every stab hurts.

item-gaia-rod.name: Gaia Rod
item-gaia-rod.description: A staff that has the power of the earth. It gets power from the Forest of Beginnings secretly.

item-gaia-sword.name: Gaia Sword
item-gaia-sword.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of earth. Because it's made from very hard material, it won't chip easily.

item-gigant-hammer.name: Gigant Hammer
item-gigant-hammer.description: A large hammer. Be careful not to hit yourself!

item-gladius.name: Gladius
item-gladius.description: A short sword forged through years of disciplined smithing. Like, really sharp and stuff.

item-golden-hammer.name: Golden Hammer
item-golden-hammer.description: A hammer reinforced with gold. Can be charged to cover wider areas. Used to flatten soil.

item-golden-turnip-staff.name: Golden Turnip Staff
item-golden-turnip-staff.description: A staff in the shape of a Golden Turnip. When you drop it in the fountain, just be honest and say you dropped a gold staff.

item-golem-punch.name: Golem  Punch
item-golem-punch.description: Learning the way of Golems' punch. It's sad that they don't fly off.

item-gorgeous-lx.name: Gorgeous Lx
item-gorgeous-lx.description: Gorgeous dual blades. Not only one, but two of them. They're gorgeous, and you can be too, by wielding them.

item-gorgeous-sword.name: Gorgeous Sword
item-gorgeous-sword.description: A gorgeous and dazzling sword which shines with an elegance like that of freshly fallen snow.

item-grand-smasher.name: Grand Smasher
item-grand-smasher.description: A long sword with spiky edges. Imbued with earth power, its spikes are designed to look like mountains.

item-grantale.name: Grantale
item-grantale.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of earth. Very tough and guaranteed not to break or your money back!

item-graviton-hammer.name: Graviton Hammer
item-graviton-hammer.description: A hammer imbued with earth power. Designed not to hurt your hands during attack.

item-great-axe.name: Great Axe
item-great-axe.description: An axe with improved balance. Often thought of as a go-to axe when you're just not sure what weapon to use.

item-great-hammer.name: Great Hammer
item-great-hammer.description: A hammer designed to eliminate shock when used. Very nicely balanced.

item-great-sword.name: Great Sword
item-great-sword.description: A long sword designed to never dull or need sharpening. Balanced and easy to hold.

item-gungnir.name: Gungnir
item-gungnir.description: A legendary spear that can blow away storms. Its wind speed is so fast, though, that the bearer is equally at risk.

item-halberd.name: Halberd
item-halberd.description: A spear used for various purposes -- though most involve stabbing and cutting, as you might imagine.

item-hammer.name: Hammer
item-hammer.description: Farming hammer given a quickie reforge for battle-readiness. Tougher than it looks.

item-heart-fire.name: Heart Fire
item-heart-fire.description: Dual blades as hot as the sun. Their fire is said to turn everything to ash.

item-heat-axe.name: Heat Axe
item-heat-axe.description: An axe with burning blades. Nicknamed "Phoenix Feather,

item-heaven-asunder.name: Heaven Asunder
item-heaven-asunder.description: A legendary sword with a sharp blade that can pierce clouds. High chance of knocking down foes in a single blow.

item-heavy-lance.name: Heavy Lance
item-heavy-lance.description: A lance designed with a focus on attack power only, to the detriment of everything else. Heavy and hard to wield.

item-hell-branch.name: Hell Branch
item-hell-branch.description: A staff made from a netherworld branch. There's rumors that the kid who invented this was scolded by his parents.

item-hell-curse.name: Hell Curse
item-hell-curse.description: A staff that is believed to be created in a hellish pot. By the way, the udon cooked in that pot tastes amazing.

item-ice-hammer.name: Ice Hammer
item-ice-hammer.description: A hammer made of ice. Good for smashing things on a hot day. Refreshing!

item-ice-staff.name: Ice Staff
item-ice-staff.description: A staff imbued with the magic power of water. The head is very cold and seems to emanate a faint breeze.

item-iceberg.name: Iceberg
item-iceberg.description: A spear imbued with water power. Designed to work even underwater. Stab the fish, and you won't need a rod!

item-icifier.name: Icifier
item-icifier.description: The chill from this sword freezes water in the air. Perfect for making shaved ice.

item-invisiblade.name: Invisiblade
item-invisiblade.description: Can you see the true blade?

item-iron-bat.name: Iron Bat
item-iron-bat.description: An iron bat used in baseball. Not designed as weaponry, but beggars can't be choosers... Maybe you'll hit a home run!

item-iron-edge.name: Iron Edge
item-iron-edge.description: Reinforced dual blades. Heavy but well-balanced, making them easy to wield.

item-iron-hammer.name: Iron Hammer
item-iron-hammer.description: A hammer reinforced with bronze. Can be charged to cover wider areas. Used to flatten soil.

item-iron-sickle.name: Iron Sickle
item-iron-sickle.description: A fairly sharp sickle. Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

item-ironleaf-fists.name: Ironleaf Fists
item-ironleaf-fists.description: Hurts, of course. Be careful not to stab yourself instead.

item-joy-waterpot.name: Joy Waterpot
item-joy-waterpot.description: A lovely waterpot. So lovely that its water strikes the field as if tears from an omnibenevolent deity above.

item-katana.name: Katana
item-katana.description: A weapon from the Far East. Beautiful, strong and sharp. In rare cases, you may knock down foes with a single blow.

item-katzbalger.name: Katzbalger
item-katzbalger.description: A smartly-designed sword with an aerodynamic shape that makes it easy to swing.

item-kongo.name: Kongo
item-kongo.description: Made by fusing together chunks of metal. Long-ranged, but hard to handle.

item-kote.name: Kote
item-kote.description: A weapon that can be used as armor.

item-lance.name: Lance
item-lance.description: Has a unique triangular shape. Said to have been used in a war fought by an ancient empire.

item-leather-gloves.name: Leather Gloves
item-leather-gloves.description: They're for protecting your fists rather than attacking. Since there are holes for fingers, it's easy to grab monsters.

item-legendary-sickle.name: Legendary Sickle
item-legendary-sickle.description: This sickle is sick...le! Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

item-legion.name: Legion
item-legion.description: A lance with blades orbiting it. Foes can try to dodge, but these phantom blades ensure they won't make it very far.

item-lightning-wand.name: Lightning Wand
item-lightning-wand.description: A staff imbued with the magic power of wind. Said to bring thunder and lightning.

item-lion-waterpot.name: Lion Waterpot
item-lion-waterpot.description: A super-cool waterpot. So cool that it can cover wider areas than most.

item-lollipop.name: Lollipop
item-lollipop.description: A sweet candy on a stick that's so hard, it just might work as a weapon. Raises chance of knockouts and cavities.

item-love-love-rod.name: Love-Love Rod
item-love-love-rod.description: A staff of love. Among wizard couples, it's secretly popular to equip it together.

item-luck-blade.name: Luck Blade
item-luck-blade.description: A sword that brings fortune to its wielder. You should totally buy a lottery ticket!

item-lumber-axe.name: Lumber Axe
item-lumber-axe.description: A nice, strong silver axe. Can be charged to cover wider areas.

item-mages-staff.name: Mage's Staff
item-mages-staff.description: A staff that can be used as a walking stick. Popular among older wizards.

item-magic-broom.name: Magic Broom
item-magic-broom.description: A staff that long ago belonged to a witch. You can use it to fly around in classic witchy style.

item-magic-shot.name: Magic Shot
item-magic-shot.description: A trumpet-shaped syringe. Makes mysterious sloshy sounds. Getting pierced with it would hurt a lot.

item-magical-lance.name: Magical Lance
item-magical-lance.description: A lance with magical power so strong that its entire form changes color rapidly.

item-metus.name: Metus
item-metus.description: A spear shaped to dig holes. Those who are struck by it have little hope of survival, thanks to its hidden might.

item-miracle-axe.name: Miracle Axe
item-miracle-axe.description: An axe so amazing, poems are written of its noble deeds. Shorter time needed to charge, making it highly efficient.

item-mjolnir.name: Mjolnir
item-mjolnir.description: A hammer imbued with earth power. It's said to cause earthquakes if three of them hit the ground at once.

item-monk-staff.name: Monk Staff
item-monk-staff.description: A nicely decorated stick with adjustable length.

item-moon-shadow.name: Moon Shadow
item-moon-shadow.description: A weapon from the Far East. Appears as naught but a shadow under cover of night. Can take down foes in a single blow.

item-mountain-axe.name: Mountain Axe
item-mountain-axe.description: An axe like an ox. Made from gold and can be charged to cover wider areas.

item-needle-spear.name: Needle Spear
item-needle-spear.description: A spear with a long blade. Has many uses and a high rate of owner satisfaction. A+++ would wield again.

item-orcus-sword.name: Orcus Sword
item-orcus-sword.description: These long blades allow for a number of attacks to be made from a distance.

item-orochi.name: Orochi
item-orochi.description: A sword separated into several parts, making it easy to wrap around foes. Capable of hitting far away enemies.

item-overbreak.name: Overbreak
item-overbreak.description: A spear with a huge blade. Every swing makes the enemy flinch. Maybe swinging will be enough!

item-pine-club.name: Pine Club
item-pine-club.description: A lance that resembles a pineapple. Its surface stings. The creator of this lance must have been very...unique.

item-pitchfork.name: Pitchfork
item-pitchfork.description: Origin of kitchen forks. Bit big for cake, though. And spaghetti? Fahgeddabouddit!

item-platinum-edge.name: Platinum Edge
item-platinum-edge.description: Dual blades made of pure platinum. Very sharp and durable.

item-platinum-hammer.name: Platinum Hammer
item-platinum-hammer.description: A hammer made from platinum. Shorter time needed to charge, making it highly efficient. Used to flatten soil.

item-platinum-sword.name: Platinum Sword
item-platinum-sword.description: A sword made from fine platinum. Highly durable. Makes its bearer more popular just by havin- Hey, what are you doing later tonight?

item-poison-blade.name: Poison Blade
item-poison-blade.description: A longsword with a poison-covered blade. So dangerous that even a small scratch can kill you.

item-poison-queen.name: Poison Queen
item-poison-queen.description: A lance drenched in poisons from around the world. Handle with care, or you, too, may be poisoned.

item-poison-spear.name: Poison Spear
item-poison-spear.description: A poisoned spear. Has a wide blade, making it easy to spread poison.

item-pole-axe.name: Pole Axe
item-pole-axe.description: An axe with a crescent moon-shaped blade. Has a pointy end as well. Choppy-choppy OR stabby-stabby. You decide!

item-priest-saber.name: Priest Saber
item-priest-saber.description: Dual blades used by priests for protection. They're quite powerful, and guaranteed to keep anyone safely preaching.

item-psycho.name: Psycho
item-psycho.description: A uniquely-shaped long sword. Its three blades have assorted curses on them, inflicting numerous status ailments.

item-punisher.name: Punisher
item-punisher.description: A long sword with a wide blade. Hurts worse than an atomic wedgie.

item-quality-sickle.name: Quality Sickle
item-quality-sickle.description: A high-quality sickle. Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

item-rainbow-waterpot.name: Rainbow Waterpot
item-rainbow-waterpot.description: A colorful waterpot. So colorful that it can cover wider areas than most. It wishes to be the prettiest waterpot at the dance.

item-rampage.name: Rampage
item-rampage.description: Called "Rampage" due to their fiery power and the violence

item-raventine.name: Raventine
item-raventine.description: A short sword with high heat. According to legend, it's said to have once turned a lake into a hot spring.

item-rock-axe.name: Rock Axe
item-rock-axe.description: Has one of the hardest blades of any axe. As a result, it's also one of the heaviest axes around.

item-rod.name: Rod
item-rod.description: A staff with magical power. Designed for sorcery, so it reduces RP spent when using magic.

item-ruby-rod.name: Ruby Rod
item-ruby-rod.description: A passionate staff that shines bright red. No one can stop the feelings gushing out from this weapon.

item-rune-blade.name: Rune Blade
item-rune-blade.description: A treasured sword with rune power. The light beaming from it casts no shadow.

item-rune-edge.name: Rune Edge
item-rune-edge.description: Dual blade imbued with rune power. Those lucky enough to see them in action may have their dreams come true.

item-rune-legend.name: Rune Legend
item-rune-legend.description: Swordsmen call this a legendary short sword. The runes imbued on its blade shine majestically.

item-rune-staff.name: Rune Staff
item-rune-staff.description: A staff used by great wizards. Its magical power can be boosted by writing runes in the air.

item-sacred-pole.name: Sacred Pole
item-sacred-pole.description: A pole for master fishers. Can be charged to attract fish from far away.

item-safety-lance.name: Safety Lance
item-safety-lance.description: A lance with its tip covered in cotton and cloth. Still hurts, though. We can stab if we want to!

item-saint-axe.name: Saint Axe
item-saint-axe.description: A holy axe with sacred powers. Originally forged for use in rituals, not battle, making it a bit unwieldy.

item-sakura.name: Sakura
item-sakura.description: A cursed red sword. Though it has a beautiful name, its edge is coated with poison.

item-salamander.name: Salamander
item-salamander.description: Dual blades set ablaze. Be careful you don't get burned, 'cause these swords are hot, hot, hot!

item-sapphire-rod.name: Sapphire Rod
item-sapphire-rod.description: A very cute rod. This is the best for those who care about the beauty of their hair.

item-schnabel.name: Schnabel
item-schnabel.description: A hammer designed to be small and light. Has good overall balance.

item-scrap-metal.name: Scrap Metal
item-scrap-metal.description: A super-duper awesomely spectacular piece of scrap metal that's super-duper useless to most people.

item-sea-cutter.name: Sea Cutter
item-sea-cutter.description: A sword that can supposedly divide the sea. Listen closely and you'll hear the sound of ocean waves.

item-seasoned-hoe.name: Seasoned Hoe
item-seasoned-hoe.description: A stronger hoe. Covers an even wider area when charged than the Sturdy Hoe.

item-shine-blade.name: Shine Blade
item-shine-blade.description: A sword with a high-heat blade and an ice-cold tip. Even evil hearts are soothed by its shiny glow.

item-shiny-hoe.name: Shiny Hoe
item-shiny-hoe.description: A hoe that glimmers like the sweat on your brow. Covers a very wide area when charged.

item-shooting-star-staff.name: Shooting Star Staff
item-shooting-star-staff.description: A staff inspired by speeding stars in the sky. Sadly, your speed will not become twice as fast.

item-short-dagger.name: Short Dagger
item-short-dagger.description: Hold one in each hand to overwhelm your foes. If you do this, though, you can't bear a shield.

item-silent-grave.name: Silent Grave
item-silent-grave.description: A spear with a removable knife-like blade at its tip. Has a sealing effect on enemies.

item-silver-hammer.name: Silver Hammer
item-silver-hammer.description: A hammer reinforced with silver. Can be charged to cover wider areas. Used to flatten soil.

item-silver-staff.name: Silver Staff
item-silver-staff.description: A staff made with sacred silver gems. Improves concentration, making it ideal for students.

item-skilled-pole.name: Skilled Pole
item-skilled-pole.description: A pole for novice fishers. Can be charged to attract fish from far away.

item-sky-hammer.name: Sky Hammer
item-sky-hammer.description: A hammer with wings. Very light and easy to use.

item-smash-blade.name: Smash Blade
item-smash-blade.description: A sword designed to target a foe's vital points, no matter what style or form you use.
